eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Gunnison; Hinsdale; Ouray, CO; at 4:42 PM on JUN 30, 2026 Effective until 8:42 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: From the GMUG Forest Supervisor: Due to a fast moving wildfire, EVACUATE the Forest Service lands in the Cow Creek, Big Cimarron, Silver Jack Basin areas. Lands to the east of Hwy 550, south of Hwy 50, and west of East Fork of the Cimarron are closed. LEAVE NOW.
